name: Quick Killer Abs & Core Circuit
description: A quick 3-exercise bodyweight circuit targeting abs and core. Pointed toe pedaling crunch, alternating leg lowers, and reverse plank knee tucks — 20 reps each for 3 sets.

exercises.notes: Pointed toes, head raised and still. Pedal legs to almost straight.
20 total (10 per leg). Keep back flat, control the movement.
Hands and feet on floor, face up. Drive knees to chest.

tips: Only 3 exercises — focus on form over speed
20 reps each, 2-3 sets (do 3 if you can)
Keep core engaged throughout all exercises
